sources.notes: Official Met Éireann weather warnings (Status Yellow/Orange/Red) for all of Ireland. Array of warnings with type (Wind, Rain, Snow-ice, etc.), level, severity, onset, expiry, headline, description, regions (FIPS codes). Updated every 60s; county-level files also available at /Open_Data/json/warning_EI16.json etc.
Met Éireann location forecast API (MET Norway wdb2ts backend). Pass lat/long/alt query params for a point forecast (temperature, wind, precipitation, pressure). Used by the public forecast site.
FDSNWS earthquake event query bounded to the Irish landmass/continental-shelf bbox. Returns recent events with magnitude, depth, time and location. Pan-European; use bbox params to scope to Ireland.

sources.authority: EPA Ireland / Air Quality Ireland (Sonitus Systems)
sources.notes: AirQuality.ie monitoring-station directory with live Air Quality Index for Health (AQIH) per station and a 3km gridded AQIH map. Underlying EPA open data is published via data.epa.ie; station readings and modelled map update several times per hour.

sources.authority: Office of Public Works (OPW) — Flood Information Service
sources.notes: OPW national flood information portal: flood maps, past flood events, and Open Spatial Data Portal (CC BY-NC-ND 4.0) with National Indicative Fluvial/Coastal flood extents and depths. Primarily map/GIS products rather than a real-time feed.

sources.authority: Semaphore (SEMO) — Irish Single Electricity Market Operator
sources.notes: SEM market operator portal publishing all-island electricity market reports (generation, demand, wind, interconnector flows, imbalance prices). EirGrid also operates the Smart Grid Dashboard for real-time generation/demand/CO2 data (JS-rendered).
